raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-declarative commitment to interactional boundaries and epistemic integrity",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "clarity and coherence are currently being enacted",
    "speaking can occur without self-diminishment",
    "listening can occur without loss of self",
    "truth is recognizable and distinguishable from non-truth",
    "departure is a viable and appropriate response to detected misalignment with truth"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent; parallel first-person affirmations create a unified stance without logical contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the statement functions as an explicit, revisable protocol within a shared context where participants can verify alignment with observable communicative behavior",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is treated as descriptive fact rather than aspirational stance, or is invoked to preemptively exit dialogue without evidence-based assessment of 'truth'"
}
